summary: Contract is unfit for grading. The declared weight total (1.00) is arithmetically wrong (actual 1.10). Multiple passThresholds invoke a `bun run test` script that does not exist in promptnotes/package.json. Several CRITs cite property-test files (editorReducer.property.test.ts, editorPredicates.property.test.ts, debounceSchedule.property.test.ts) that are absent from the repository. DOM vitest tests live in `__tests__/dom/` but the contract addresses them at `__tests__/`. Passive grep thresholds (`grep -c "kind:" types.ts == 17`, `grep -c "dispatch" tauriEditorAdapter.ts == 16`, exact-string shadow grep, `branchCoverage.pct` JSON key) cannot evaluate to true against the actual sources. Phase 3 cannot proceed against this contract.
